# Title
<!-- type(scope): what changed (this becomes the commit message) -->

## Summary
<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Changes
<!-- High-level changes that matter — not code-level descriptions. -->

## Gotchas
<!-- Optional: any weirdness, tradeoffs, or unexpected behavior. -->

## Testing
<!--
Convince us this works. Which test types did you use, and did you cover both
happy and unhappy paths?
- Unit tests — which cases, which edge cases?
- Spec tests (sqllogictest)
- E2E / integration
- Other: performance, load, etc.

Reminders: cargo test, cargo clippy, cargo fmt --check
-->

## Production safety
<!-- If relevant: data integrity, crash/recovery, on-disk format or migration
impact, backward compatibility, performance regressions. What could go wrong,
and how is it mitigated? -->

## References
<!-- Optional: design docs / ADR issue this implements, tickets, related PRs. -->

Bug: TICKET-ID
Breaking: no
Closes: #issue
-->
